title: PVPLite
description: The essentials of PVP. Extremely lightweight.
body: ![DescriptionFirstHalf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c7e788075f6f1d36d752e1bf3850287359568af_0.webp) ![DescriptionSecondHalfv2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36ffa600eb6d524dace971d7cbee2d9df98eb683_0.webp) # WRITTEN ALTERNATIVE ![PVP Lite Written Desc. Branding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/349529f41c04ef0e3db65345719c492a2e2ffd84.png) **PVP Lite** is a recreation of the previous [PVP modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/-pvp-) by me. As the name suggests it is more _lightweight, well performant_, consists of just the _essentials_. You will get a lot more customizability with **PVP Lite**. > **Flexible** : You get to choose what mods, resource packs and setting to use. > > **Quick** : Faster load times compared to [PVP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/-pvp-) > > **Easy To Use** : 1 click installation, comes with well performing settings. Spend more time playing! > > **Features Everywhere** : From small shields to auto potion replacements! [![pvp logo branding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1528bcc4347c01efbc95adb7f1d41f615c2d14a_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/-pvp-) > Dont forget to check out the _original_, more _fully fledged_ version of this modpack. Just click on the **PVP** logo.
